title: galeopsis tetrahit subsp. verlotii
intro: Galeopsis tetrahit subsp. verlotii, also known as hemp-nettle or hemp nettle, is a plant species belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, making it useful for treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of galeopsis tetrahit subsp. verlotii include reducing inflammation and relieving coughs and congestion, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Galeopsis tetrahit subsp. verlotii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support respiratory health.
